articles.title: 2 killed in crash on Route 6 near Westport-Dartmouth town line
articles.description:
The two occupants in the other car sustained non-life-threatening injuries, authorities said.

The post 2 killed in crash on Route 6 near Westport-Dartmouth town line appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Two individuals died in a crash on Route 6 near Westport-Dartmouth town line.
The other vehicle's occupants suffered non-life-threatening injuries, according to authorities.
Local residents may face increased traffic disruptions and safety concerns on Route 6.

articles.title: Bus driver strike ends in Merrimack Valley after nearly 2 weeks
articles.description:
A one-year agreement gives workers a $4 hourly raise, preserves Saturday overtime, and returns fare-free bus service, the union says.

The post Bus driver strike ends in Merrimack Valley after nearly 2 weeks appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bus driver strike in Merrimack Valley ends after nearly two weeks.
Workers receive a $4 hourly raise and maintain Saturday overtime.
Fare-free bus service returns, benefiting local commuters in Boston.

articles.title: McConnell says a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking weeks of silence about health condition
articles.description:
McConnell, 84, said in a statement that he also suffered a case of mild pneumonia and has undergone a battery of tests as doctors try to determine what led to his fall.

The post McConnell says a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking weeks of silence about health condition appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell, 84, hospitalized after a fall and mild pneumonia.
McConnell underwent multiple tests to determine the cause of his fall.
His health status may impact legislative decisions affecting Boston residents.

articles.title: 5 takeaways as red-hot Red Sox rally past Mets, 3-2, for 9th straight victory
articles.description:
This team simply doesn't know how to lose.

The post 5 takeaways as red-hot Red Sox rally past Mets, 3-2, for 9th straight victory appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox secured their 9th consecutive victory against the Mets on July 12.
The team rallied to win 3-2, showcasing strong performance.
Local fans can expect increased excitement as the team continues its winning streak.

articles.title: Lindor error leads to Red Sox comeback win over Mets; Boston completes 9-0 trip
articles.description:
Boston (46-48) completed its second 9-0 trip in franchise history after one from July 29 to Aug. 7, 1977.

The post Lindor error leads to Red Sox comeback win over Mets; Boston completes 9-0 trip appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox secured a comeback win over Mets on July 12, 2026.
Boston achieved a rare 9-0 road trip, matching a record from 1977.
This victory boosts team morale and playoff hopes for local fans.
